payload.summary: Excellent match with all required skills demonstrated through relevant experience in peer support, lab preparation, and student communication.
strengths: Direct experience with Java and peer support aligns with lab delivery needs
Proven student-facing communication skills suitable for answering questions
Background in lab preparation supports teaching assistance duties
All three required skills (Java, Communication, Teaching Support) are explicitly matched
risks: Limited information about specific teaching support methodologies
No details about experience with marking consistency maintenance
Unclear depth of Java expertise beyond 'hands-on' experience
